article.title: Japanese lender launches Bitcoin-backed loans of up to $6.2M
article.summary: CRYL is offering Bitcoin-backed loans to individuals and businesses as Japanese firms explore broader uses for BTC in lending and credit markets.

headline: TeraWulf Seeks $3.5B Debt for Data Center Expansion

article.title: TeraWulf eyes $3.5B debt raise for Anthropic-linked data center: Report
article.summary: Bitcoin miner TeraWulf is reportedly seeking $3.5 billion in debt financing led by Morgan Stanley for its Kentucky data center campus leased by AI company Anthropic.

headline: Corn Slumps 2% Ahead of US Supply Data

article.title: Corn Drops as Heat Threat Eases Ahead of Key US Supply Report
article.summary: Corn futures fell for a third day as the immediate threat of extreme heat in the US eased. Traders are also awaiting the US Department of Agriculture’s WASDE report, due later Friday.

headline: Euro Stocks Rise 5% on Inflation Boost

article.title: Inflation Is a Tailwind for European, Morgan Stanley Says
article.summary: European equities stand to benefit from higher inflation, according to Morgan Stanley’s Marina Zavolock, who says the market underestimates the region’s exposure to sectors that profit from rising prices. headline: $290K Crypto Moved Illegally From Prison Account

article.title: Jailed Fraudster Charged With Moving $290K in Forfeited Crypto From Prison
article.summary: A convicted launderer serving time for a $5 million scheme allegedly moved crypto that a court had ordered him to forfeit.

headline: CFTC Gains Power Over $1B Crypto Markets

article.title: North Carolina Bill Recognizes CFTC's ‘Federal Regulatory Authority’ Over Prediction Markets
article.summary: The state's budget law leaves oversight of Kalshi and Polymarket to the CFTC and taxes them at 6%, far below what other states are pursuing.

headline: Circle Wins OCC Nod for $1B National Bank

article.title: Stablecoin firm Circle wins final OCC approval to open national trust bank
article.summary: Circle wins final OCC approval for First National Digital Currency Bank, with USDC reserve management planned for a later phase.

headline: Tangem Card Flaw Exposed Amid $1B Crypto Risk

article.title: Ledger researchers disclose Tangem card flaw; Tangem says risk to everyday users is ‘virtually non-existent’
article.summary: Ledger researchers disclosed a laser attack that resets Tangem card passwords by bypassing a recovery-state check in the firmware.

headline: $1B AI Deals Fuel China Sanctions Risk

article.summary: US groups have been supplying AI services to Singapore-based subsidiaries of Alibaba, Baidu and Tencent
